recent_news.title: Study: AI models that consider user's feeling are more likely to make errors
recent_news.summary: Overtuning can cause models to "prioritize user satisfaction over truthfulness.”
recent_news.body_text:
Overtuning can cause models to “prioritize user satisfaction over truthfulness.”
In human-to-human communication, the desire to be empathetic or polite often conflicts with the need to be truthful—hence terms like “being brutally honest” for situations where you value the truth over sparing someone’s feelings. Now, new research suggests that large language models can sometimes show a similar tende

general_news.title: Touch Taiwan登場！友達、群創聚焦Micro LED與AI智慧座艙
general_news.summary: 年度盛事「Touch Taiwan 2026」於4月8日至10日在南港展覽館登場。今年面板雙雄友達（2409）與群創（3481）分別以「映現世界 透見未來」及「玩轉世界」...…

general_news.title: 熱門股》外資回補 友達爆量鎖漲停
general_news.summary: 矽光子題材發酵，友達（2409）利用過去發展Micro LED（微發光二極體）優勢切入，目前已經送樣，預估2-3年後可商業化，可見證「光進銅退」時代來臨，儘管目前還在規格發展以及驗證階段，但市場看好矽光子在AI資料中心高速傳輸商機，資金提早卡位，友達昨日股價鎖死在漲停15.95元，成交量逾20萬張。…
